title: ChatContactQueryInput.filter_presence is Option<&str> — OwnerPresence enum already exists
description: filter_presence: Option<&'a str> filters to contacts with a specific presence state. OwnerPresence already exists in types.rs with the correct variants and #[non_exhaustive]. This should be Option<crate::types::OwnerPresence>. Using &str means typos and wrong casing are silent bugs.
